headline: San Marino first-baseline rotation assessment. Microstate (~33,000 population) in established band. No active news in recency window. Stable democratic governance, EU-aligned policy framework, strong rule-of-law indicators per Council of Europe and OECD baseline. Existing dimension means (AWR/EMP/ACT/SYS/INT/ACC 3.5; EQU 3.0; BND 4.0) consistent with established-band microstate baseline. Math-hygiene flag: published composite 65.5 cannot reconstruct from current dimension means (reconstructed 62.5). Per scanner rules, math-hygiene cluster issues are flagged for data-team review only. Recommend confirm + math-hygiene flag.
key_evidence: Council of Europe baseline: stable democratic institutions; rule-of-law indicators consistent with established-band Western European microstate.
EU-aligned policy framework via cooperation agreement (2018); UN member state.
OECD economic and governance baseline indicators in established band.
Healthcare system universal coverage; education indicators strong.
No active news in May 2026 recency window.

evidence.finding: Member state in good standing; rule-of-law and human-rights compliance baseline.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 3.5 confirmed. Standard established-band microstate awareness mechanisms.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.0 confirmed. Microstate scale limits distributional concerns; standard EU-aligned framework.
scoring_rationale.BND: 4.0 confirmed. Rule-of-law and CoE membership sustain established-band boundary discipline.

math_check.validator_check: Math-hygiene discrepancy noted. Per scanner rules, no composite change proposed; flag for data-team review.

math_hygiene_flag.issue: Published composite 65.5 vs reconstructed 62.5 from dimension means. Discrepancy +3.0 points.
math_hygiene_flag.action: Flag for data-team review. Preserve published composite pending data-team reconciliation.

positiveSignals: CoE membership in good standing; EU-aligned framework; stable democratic governance.
sector_context: European microstate cluster (San Marino, Malta, Andorra, Liechtenstein, Monaco, Luxembourg, Vatican). Established-band placement consistent with peer microstates.
